what_it_does: Seam-lane report (JSON record) for the spec-compiler MAP roles: roles/decompose_seed.py (splits a seed idea into groups) and roles/expand_criterion.py (expands each group into a two-faced FUNCTION+FORM criterion). Records verification by use on the resident chat-4b, the schemas, the governance floor, and the cascade-wiring plan for a later beat.
observations: files_written: decompose_seed.py, expand_criterion.py; new_role_ids both; both op=generate, mode_scope={spec}.
Discovery: both live; the 'spec' cast = {decompose_seed, expand_criterion, ground_criterion} (ground_criterion from a concurrent lane); listening cast remains the canonical six.
By-use harness /tmp/spec_map_byuse.py: decompose_seed produced 4 groups from a seed; run_items(expand_criterion, 4 groups) -> 4 units, 0 failed, concurrent finish_order, every output validated.
Both faces present on every criterion: FUNCTION and FORM non-empty (real FORM bar for surface groups, literal 'n/a' for backend-only group).
Floor: cognition_governance_acceptance 42/42; roles_acceptance passes every structural check then reds only at line 174 drift listing the four spec-compiler roles.

Honest caveat: the model's reuse:<file> cites are PRELIMINARY/proposed and some exact paths are not real repo files; expand_criterion deliberately defers authoritative no-fiction grounding to the other lane's ground_criterion.
Documents the next-beat cascade wiring (save_cascade spec-compiler: decompose -> expand -> ground -> triad_synth) and that input_addresses stays default ('utterance',).
standouts: Two-faced criterion schema enforcing both FUNCTION and FORM (FORM as half of done), with honest 'n/a' for backend-only groups.
Explicit deferral of no-fiction reuse-grounding to a downstream role, with the proof framed as MECHANISM not criterion quality.
Concurrent lane awareness: the shared 'spec' cast and drift list reflect a sibling lane's ground_criterion/triad_synth landing in parallel.
conventions: Cast-beyond-listening (mode_scope={spec}); pure ROLE dict + Pydantic, floor by construction.
Default input_addresses=('utterance',) with unit fields as keys, not declared inputs, to avoid the net-new compose path.
Expected-red-on-drift acknowledged; file-disjoint with the concurrent ground+synth lane.
concerns: The report itself flags that proposed reuse:<file> paths are not real repo files (by design, grounded later) — a reader could mistake them for ground truth without the docstring deferral.
notes: Builds the spec-compiler's first two MAP roles (decompose seed into groups, expand each into a two-faced criterion) and proves the mechanism, deferring reuse-grounding and criterion quality to a downstream cascade.
questions: When does the next beat assemble the full spec-compiler cascade (decompose->expand->ground->triad_synth) and add the CONFIRM jury vs the seed?
How is the corpus-grounded per-unit retrieve (embedder enhancement) supplied once the embedder window is available?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — it is the spec-map lane report and documents the two MAP roles plus mechanism verification, explicitly scoping out criterion-quality and reuse-grounding.
apparent_themes: Spec compilation from seed idea into grounded two-faced criteria
FUNCTION+FORM as both halves of done
Deferred no-fiction grounding (propose now, ground downstream)
Concurrent file-disjoint lane composition into a shared cast
intention_signals: Documents building the front of a spec-compiler that turns a one-line seed into structured FUNCTION+FORM criteria, with truthful reuse-vs-net-new grounding handed to a later role.
novelty: The two-faced criterion (FUNCTION+FORM, FORM honestly 'n/a' when backend-only) and the explicit propose-then-ground separation across sibling roles.
contribution: Contributes the decompose_seed and expand_criterion roles, the two-faced criterion schema, and the documented cascade-wiring plan tying them to ground_criterion/triad_synth — the MAP front of the spec compiler.
summary_for_embedding: Seam-lane report building the spec-compiler MAP roles decompose_seed and expand_criterion (op=generate, mode_scope=spec) that turn a seed idea into two-faced FUNCTION+FORM criteria, verified by use on the resident 4B.
intention_for_embedding: To build the front of a spec-compiler that decomposes a seed into groups and expands each into a two-faced criterion, deferring authoritative reuse-grounding to a downstream role.
